body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
Add a scaling factor for hyperdiffusion and vertical diffusion of precipitating species so we can tune it. To preserve the current behavior the default of the hyperdiffusion factor is set to 0 and the default of the vertical diffusion factor is set to 1 in ClimaParams.

Note that I didn't add `tracer_vertical_diffusion_factor` to vert_diff_params because this will be used by EDMF as well, once we add vertical diffusion of precipitating species in EDMF.

title: add a scaling factor for precipitation diffusion
